message:
fix(context): exclude embedding vectors from JSON output

The --json output was including raw 384-float embedding arrays for each
rule, bloating output by ~3KB per bullet and exposing internal
implementation details that consumers don't need.

Now destructures to exclude the embedding field when building the
response for relevantBullets and antiPatterns.

Fixes #18

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
